question.text: What is the maximum shareholding a sponsor or its associate can hold in the AMC or trustee company of ANY OTHER mutual fund?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** No sponsor, its associate or group company shall have 10% or more of the shareholding or voting rights in the AMC or trustee company of any other mutual fund. **The Trap:** 25% is the single investor corpus limit in a scheme, not the cross-holding limit. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This prevents cross-ownership concentration across mutual fund entities.
